You are playing an online public goods game (PGG).
Your demographic profile: age=30; gender=unknown; education=master.
Each round, you are given 20 coins and need to decide how many coins to put into the shared pot (either 0 or 20).
You will not see others' choices before you decide.
The pot is multiplied by 6.2x and split equally among all players.
Your round payoff is: coins you kept + your equal share of the multiplied pot.
After contributions are redistributed, players may punish each other.
You may send messages to the group chat.

Your demographic profile: age=29; gender=man; education=bachelor.

After contributions are redistributed, players may reward each other.

After contributions are redistributed, players may punish or reward each other.

You are playing an online public goods game (PGG).
Your demographic profile: age=22; gender=man; education=other.

Your round payoff is: coins you kept + your equal share of the multiplied pot.
After contributions are redistributed, players may punish or reward each other.

# GAME COMPLETE

You are playing an online public goods game (PGG).
Your demographic profile: age=26; gender=man; education=bachelor.
Each round, you are given 20 coins and need to decide how many coins to put into the shared pot (integer from 0 to 20).
You will not see others' choices before you decide.
The pot is multiplied by 1.8x and split equally among all players.
Your round payoff is: coins you kept + your equal share of the multiplied pot.
After contributions are redistributed, players may reward each other.
You may send messages to the group chat.

You are playing an online public goods game (PGG).

You will not see others' choices before you decide.
The pot is multiplied by 1.8x and split equally among all players.
Your round payoff is: coins you kept + your equal share of the multiplied pot.
After contributions are redistributed, players may reward each other.
You may send messages to the group chat.

You are playing an online public goods game (PGG).
Your demographic profile: age=64; gender=unknown; education=high_school.
Each round, you are given 20 coins and need to decide how many coins to put into the shared pot (integer from 0 to 20).

After contributions are redistributed, players may reward each other.
You may send messages to the group chat.
